```xml
<Window x:Class="WebViewHub.FloatingIslandWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:controls="clr-namespace:WebViewHub.Controls"
        Title="调度台 - WebViewHub"
        Height="50" Width="50"
        MinHeight="50" MinWidth="50"
        WindowStyle="None"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="Transparent"
        Topmost="True"
        ShowInTaskbar="False"
        Loaded="Window_Loaded"
        Deactivated="Window_Deactivated">
    
    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- 隐形拖拽手柄样式 -->
        <Style x:Key="InvisibleThumbStyle" TargetType="Thumb">
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Thumb">
                        <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"/>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <!-- 灵动球/展开面板复合体 -->
    <Border x:Name="FloatingIsland"
            CornerRadius="25"
            Background="#D9FFFFFF"
            BorderBrush="#E5E5E7"
            BorderThickness="1"
            MouseEnter="FloatingIsland_MouseEnter"
            MouseLeave="FloatingIsland_MouseLeave">
        <Border.Effect>
            <DropShadowEffect Color="#000000" Opacity="0.15" BlurRadius="20" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="270"/>
        </Border.Effect>

        <Grid>
            <!-- 状态A: 灵动图标模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="IconGrid">
                <Image x:Name="FloatingIcon"
                       Source="pack://application:,,,/Assets/lucky_cat.png"
                       Width="28" Height="28"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center"
                       RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"
                       IsHitTestVisible="False"/>
                <Thumb x:Name="IconDragThumb"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       Cursor="Hand"
                       PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="IconDragThumb_PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp"
                       DragStarted="FloatingDrag_Started"
                       DragDelta="FloatingDrag_Delta"
                       DragCompleted="FloatingDrag_Completed"
                       Background="Transparent"/>
            </Grid>

            <!-- 状态B: 展开独立调度台模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="FloatingPanel" Visibility="Collapsed" Margin="0">
                <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <RowDefinition Height="24"/> <!-- 标题拉拽吸附头 -->
                    <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                
                <!-- 窗口交互顶栏 -->
                <Grid Grid.Row="0" Background="Transparent">
                    <TextBlock Text="调度台指令" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Foreground="#888" FontSize="11" IsHitTestVisible="False" Margin="0,6,0,0"/>
                    <Thumb x:Name="WindowDragThumb"
                           Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                           Cursor="SizeAll"
                           DragStarted="FloatingDrag_Started"
                           DragDelta="FloatingDrag_Delta"
                           DragCompleted="FloatingDrag_Completed"/>
                </Grid>

                <controls:CentralCommandPanel x:Name="CommandPanel" Grid.Row="1" Background="Transparent" Margin="8,0,8,8"/>
                
                <!-- 四角 + 四边 缩放拉手 -->
                <!-- 左上角 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="8" Height="8" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="NW"/>
                <!-- 右上角 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="8" Height="8" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="NE"/>
                <!-- 左下角 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="8" Height="8" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="SW"/>
                <!-- 右下角 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="12" Height="12" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="SE"/>
                <!-- 上边 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Height="4" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="N"/>
                <!-- 下边 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Height="4" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="S"/>
                <!-- 左边 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="4" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="W"/>
                <!-- 右边 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="4" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="E"/>
            </Grid>
        </Grid>
    </Border>
</Window>
```

现在更新代码后端以支持所有方向的缩放：
Now let me update the code-behind to handle all directions of resizing:
8 directions.

```csharp
using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls.Primitives;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;

namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private bool _hasMovedDuringDrag = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; } // 便于调用系统功能和通知状态

        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }

        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            // 给它内部的指令面板也赋以参考
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;

            // 刚加载时开启闲置监控
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }

        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }

        // ---------- 拖拽移动逻辑 ----------
        private void FloatingDrag_Started(object sender, DragStartedEventArgs e)
        {
            _isDragging = true;
            _hasMovedDuringDrag = false;
            RestartInactiveTimer();
            ResetOpacity();
        }

        private void FloatingDrag_Delta(object sender, DragDeltaEventArgs e)
        {
            if (Math.Abs(e.HorizontalChange) > 1 || Math.Abs(e.VerticalChange) > 1)
            {
                _hasMovedDuringDrag = true;
            }

            // 直接改变 Window 的绝对坐标 (支持跨显示器)
            Left += e.HorizontalChange;
            Top += e.VerticalChange;
            
            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }

        private void FloatingDrag_Completed(object sender, DragCompletedEventArgs e)
        {
            _isDragging = false;

            if (_hasMovedDuringDrag)
            {
                if (!_isExpanded)
                {
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
            }
            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }

        // ---------- 缩放逻辑 - 单角缩放 (保留兼容) ----------
        private void WindowResizeThumb_DragDelta(object sender, DragDeltaEventArgs e)
        {
            double newWidth = Width + e.HorizontalChange;
            double newHeight = Height + e.VerticalChange;

            // 限制防出界和最小限制
            newWidth = Math.Max(200, Math.Min(newWidth, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width));
            newHeight = Math.Max(150, Math.Min(newHeight, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height));

            Width = newWidth;
            Height = newHeight;

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }

        // ---------- 缩放逻辑 - 八方向通用缩放 ----------
        private void ResizeThumb_DragDelta(object sender, DragDeltaEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is not Thumb thumb) return;

            string? direction = thumb.Tag?.ToString();
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;

            switch (direction)
            {
                case "SE": // 右下
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width + e.HorizontalChange));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height + e.VerticalChange));
                    break;
                case "SW": // 左下
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width - e.HorizontalChange));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left += Width - newWidthSW;
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height + e.VerticalChange));
                    break;
                case "NE": // 右上
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width + e.HorizontalChange));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height - e.VerticalChange));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top += Height - newHeightNE;
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW": // 左上
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width - e.HorizontalChange));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left += Width - newWidthNW;
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height - e.VerticalChange));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top += Height - newHeightNW;
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E": // 右
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width + e.HorizontalChange));
                    break;
                case "W": // 左
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width - e.HorizontalChange));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left += Width - newWidthW;
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S": // 下
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height + e.VerticalChange));
                    break;
                case "N": // 上
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height - e.VerticalChange));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top += Height - newHeightN;
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }

        // ---------- 点击触发展开 ----------
        private void IconDragThumb_PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_hasMovedDuringDrag && !_isExpanded)
            {
                Expand();
            }
        }

        // ---------- 闲置降噪逻辑 ----------
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop(); // 鼠标悬浮不计时
        }

        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded && !_isDragging)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }

        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }

        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !_isDragging && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);

                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = Left;
                if (cx < sw / 2)
                    targetX = -25;
                else
                    targetX = sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }

        // ---------- 形态展开动作 ----------
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;

            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);

            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 重要：展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }

        // ---------- 形态收缩动作 ----------
        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;

            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120; // 虚拟收缩点

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);

            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}

```

现在让我也修复拖拽只能进行一次的问题。问题可能是 One common fix is to use window-level mouse handling instead of relying solely on Thumb. Thumb 在第一次拖拽后失去了鼠标捕获。让我改进拖拽逻辑：
Now let me also fix the issue where dragging can only happen once. The issue might be that the Thumb loses mouse capture after the first drag. Let me improve the drag logic to work more reliably:


```csharp
using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls.Primitives;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;

namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private bool _hasMovedDuringDrag = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; } // 便于调用系统功能和通知状态

        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }

        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            // 给它内部的指令面板也赋以参考
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;

            // 刚加载时开启闲置监控
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }

        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }

        // ---------- 拖拽移动逻辑 ----------
        private void FloatingDrag_Started(object sender, DragStartedEventArgs e)
        {
            _isDragging = true;
            _hasMovedDuringDrag = false;
            RestartInactiveTimer();
            ResetOpacity();
        }

        private void FloatingDrag_Delta(object sender, DragDeltaEventArgs e)
        {
            if (Math.Abs(e.HorizontalChange) > 0.5 || Math.Abs(e.VerticalChange) > 0.5)
            {
                _hasMovedDuringDrag = true;
            }

            // 直接改变 Window 的绝对坐标 (支持跨显示器)
            Left += e.HorizontalChange;
            Top += e.VerticalChange;

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }

        private void FloatingDrag_Completed(object sender, DragCompletedEventArgs e)
        {
            _isDragging = false;

            if (_hasMovedDuringDrag)
            {
                if (!_isExpanded)
                {
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
            }
            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }

        // ---------- 窗口级拖拽支持 (当 Thumb 失效时的备用方案) ----------
        private bool _isWindowDragging = false;
        private Point _dragStartPoint;

        private void Window_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded && !_isDragging)
            {
                // 展开状态下，点击标题栏区域开始拖拽
                _isWindowDragging = true;
                _dragStartPoint = e.GetPosition(this);
                this.CaptureMouse();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }

        private void Window_MouseMove(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isWindowDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                Point currentPos = e.GetPosition(this);
                double deltaX = currentPos.X - _dragStartPoint.X;
                double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _dragStartPoint.Y;

                if (Math.Abs(deltaX) > 3 || Math.Abs(deltaY) > 3)
                {
                    Left += deltaX;
                    Top += deltaY;
                    _hasMovedDuringDrag = true;
                }
            }
        }

        private void Window_MouseLeftButtonUp(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isWindowDragging)
            {
                _isWindowDragging = false;
                this.ReleaseMouseCapture();

                if (_hasMovedDuringDrag && !_isExpanded)
                {
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }

        // ---------- 缩放逻辑 - 单角缩放 (保留兼容) ----------
        private void WindowResizeThumb_DragDelta(object sender, DragDeltaEventArgs e)
        {
            double newWidth = Width + e.HorizontalChange;
            double newHeight = Height + e.VerticalChange;

            // 限制防出界和最小限制
            newWidth = Math.Max(200, Math.Min(newWidth, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width));
            newHeight = Math.Max(150, Math.Min(newHeight, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height));

            Width = newWidth;
            Height = newHeight;

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }

        // ---------- 缩放逻辑 - 八方向通用缩放 ----------
        private void ResizeThumb_DragDelta(object sender, DragDeltaEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is not Thumb thumb) return;

            string? direction = thumb.Tag?.ToString();
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;

            switch (direction)
            {
                case "SE": // 右下
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width + e.HorizontalChange));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height + e.VerticalChange));
                    break;
                case "SW": // 左下
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width - e.HorizontalChange));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left += Width - newWidthSW;
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height + e.VerticalChange));
                    break;
                case "NE": // 右上
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width + e.HorizontalChange));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height - e.VerticalChange));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top += Height - newHeightNE;
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW": // 左上
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width - e.HorizontalChange));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left += Width - newWidthNW;
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height - e.VerticalChange));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top += Height - newHeightNW;
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E": // 右
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width + e.HorizontalChange));
                    break;
                case "W": // 左
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, Width - e.HorizontalChange));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left += Width - newWidthW;
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S": // 下
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height + e.VerticalChange));
                    break;
                case "N": // 上
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, Height - e.VerticalChange));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top += Height - newHeightN;
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }

        // ---------- 点击触发展开 ----------
        private void IconDragThumb_PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_hasMovedDuringDrag && !_isExpanded)
            {
                Expand();
            }
        }

        // ---------- 闲置降噪逻辑 ----------
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop(); // 鼠标悬浮不计时
        }

        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded && !_isDragging)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }

        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }

        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !_isDragging && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);

                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = Left;
                if (cx < sw / 2)
                    targetX = -25;
                else
                    targetX = sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }

        // ---------- 形态展开动作 ----------
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;

            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);

            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 重要：展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }

        // ---------- 形态收缩动作 ----------
        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;

            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120; // 虚拟收缩点

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);

            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}

```

现在需要在 XAML 中添加窗口级的 I need to add the window-level mouse event handlers to the XAML to enable the fallback drag support:鼠标事件处理：
Now I need to add window-level mouse event handlers in the XAML:


```xml
<Window x:Class="WebViewHub.FloatingIslandWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:controls="clr-namespace:WebViewHub.Controls"
        Title="调度台 - WebViewHub"
        Height="50" Width="50"
        MinHeight="50" MinWidth="50"
        WindowStyle="None"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="Transparent"
        Topmost="True"
        ShowInTaskbar="False"
        Loaded="Window_Loaded"
        Deactivated="Window_Deactivated"
        MouseLeftButtonDown="Window_MouseLeftButtonDown"
        MouseMove="Window_MouseMove"
        MouseLeftButtonUp="Window_MouseLeftButtonUp">
    
    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- 隐形拖拽手柄样式 -->
        <Style x:Key="InvisibleThumbStyle" TargetType="Thumb">
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="Thumb">
                        <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"/>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <!-- 灵动球/展开面板复合体 -->
    <Border x:Name="FloatingIsland"
            CornerRadius="25"
            Background="#D9FFFFFF"
            BorderBrush="#E5E5E7"
            BorderThickness="1"
            MouseEnter="FloatingIsland_MouseEnter"
            MouseLeave="FloatingIsland_MouseLeave">
        <Border.Effect>
            <DropShadowEffect Color="#000000" Opacity="0.15" BlurRadius="20" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="270"/>
        </Border.Effect>

        <Grid>
            <!-- 状态A: 灵动图标模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="IconGrid">
                <Image x:Name="FloatingIcon"
                       Source="pack://application:,,,/Assets/lucky_cat.png"
                       Width="28" Height="28"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center"
                       RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"
                       IsHitTestVisible="False"/>
                <Thumb x:Name="IconDragThumb"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       Cursor="Hand"
                       PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp="IconDragThumb_PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp"
                       DragStarted="FloatingDrag_Started"
                       DragDelta="FloatingDrag_Delta"
                       DragCompleted="FloatingDrag_Completed"
                       Background="Transparent"/>
            </Grid>

            <!-- 状态B: 展开独立调度台模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="FloatingPanel" Visibility="Collapsed" Margin="0">
                <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <RowDefinition Height="24"/> <!-- 标题拉拽吸附头 -->
                    <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                
                <!-- 窗口交互顶栏 -->
                <Grid Grid.Row="0" Background="Transparent">
                    <TextBlock Text="调度台指令" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Foreground="#888" FontSize="11" IsHitTestVisible="False" Margin="0,6,0,0"/>
                    <Thumb x:Name="WindowDragThumb"
                           Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                           Cursor="SizeAll"
                           DragStarted="FloatingDrag_Started"
                           DragDelta="FloatingDrag_Delta"
                           DragCompleted="FloatingDrag_Completed"/>
                </Grid>

                <controls:CentralCommandPanel x:Name="CommandPanel" Grid.Row="1" Background="Transparent" Margin="8,0,8,8"/>
                
                <!-- 四角 + 四边 缩放拉手 -->
                <!-- 左上角 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="8" Height="8" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="NW"/>
                <!-- 右上角 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="8" Height="8" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="NE"/>
                <!-- 左下角 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="8" Height="8" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="SW"/>
                <!-- 右下角 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="12" Height="12" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="SE"/>
                <!-- 上边 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Height="4" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="N"/>
                <!-- 下边 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Height="4" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="S"/>
                <!-- 左边 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="4" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="W"/>
                <!-- 右边 -->
                <Thumb Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="4" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       Style="{StaticResource InvisibleThumbStyle}"
                       DragDelta="ResizeThumb_DragDelta" Tag="E"/>
            </Grid>
        </Grid>
    </Border>
</Window>

```

```xml
<Window x:Class="WebViewHub.FloatingIslandWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:controls="clr-namespace:WebViewHub.Controls"
        Title="调度台 - WebViewHub"
        Height="50" Width="50"
        MinHeight="50" MinWidth="50"
        WindowStyle="None"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="Transparent"
        Topmost="True"
        ShowInTaskbar="False"
        Loaded="Window_Loaded"
        Deactivated="Window_Deactivated"
        MouseLeftButtonDown="Window_MouseLeftButtonDown"
        MouseMove="Window_MouseMove"
        MouseLeftButtonUp="Window_MouseLeftButtonUp">

    <!-- 灵动球/展开面板复合体 -->
    <Border x:Name="FloatingIsland"
            CornerRadius="25"
            Background="#D9FFFFFF"
            BorderBrush="#E5E5E7"
            BorderThickness="1"
            MouseEnter="FloatingIsland_MouseEnter"
            MouseLeave="FloatingIsland_MouseLeave">
        <Border.Effect>
            <DropShadowEffect Color="#000000" Opacity="0.15" BlurRadius="20" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="270"/>
        </Border.Effect>

        <!-- 图标模式 -->
        <Grid x:Name="IconGrid">
            <Image x:Name="FloatingIcon"
                   Source="pack://application:,,,/Assets/lucky_cat.png"
                   Width="28" Height="28"
                   HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                   VerticalAlignment="Center"
                   RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"
                   IsHitTestVisible="False"/>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 展开模式 - 使用 Grid 而不是覆盖 -->
        <Grid x:Name="FloatingPanel" Visibility="Collapsed">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="24"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
            
            <!-- 标题栏 -->
            <Grid Grid.Row="0" Background="Transparent" Cursor="SizeAll">
                <TextBlock Text="调度台指令" 
                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" 
                           VerticalAlignment="Center" 
                           Foreground="#888" 
                           FontSize="11" 
                           IsHitTestVisible="False" 
                           Margin="0,6,0,0"/>
            </Grid>

            <!-- 内容区域 -->
            <controls:CentralCommandPanel x:Name="CommandPanel" 
                                         Grid.Row="1" 
                                         Background="Transparent" 
                                         Margin="8,0,8,8"/>
            
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="W"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="E"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Height="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="N"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Height="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="S"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NE"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="14" Height="14" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SE"/>
        </Grid>
    </Border>
</Window>
```

 Thinking...
 "using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;
namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; }
        // 拖拽状态
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private Point _dragStartPoint;
        private double _dragStartLeft;
        private double _dragStartTop;
        // 缩放状态
        private bool _isResizing = false;
        private string _resizeDirection = "";
        private Point _resizeStartPoint;
        private double _resizeStartWidth;
        private double _resizeStartHeight;
        private double _resizeStartLeft;
        private double _resizeStartTop;
        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }
        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }
        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }
        // ========== 拖拽处理 ==========
        private void Window_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (e.OriginalSource is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle)
            {
                // 如果点击的是缩放边缘矩形，不处理拖拽
                return;
            }
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                // 未展开状态：开始拖拽
                _isDragging = true;
                _dragStartPoint = e.GetPosition(Owner ?? null);
                if (_dragStartPoint.X == 0 && _dragStartPoint.Y == 0)
                {
                    _dragStartPoint = e.GetPosition(null);
                }
                _dragStartLeft = Left;
                _dragStartTop = Top;
                
                CaptureMouse();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }
        private void Window_MouseMove(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                Point currentPos = e.GetPosition(null);
                double deltaX = currentPos.X - _dragStartPoint.X;
                double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _dragStartPoint.Y;
                Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
                Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
            }
            else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                HandleResize(e.GetPosition(null));
            }
        }
        private void Window_MouseLeftButtonUp(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isDragging)
            {
                _isDragging = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                
                // 磁吸到边缘
                if (!_isExpanded)
                {
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
            else if (_isResizing)
            {
                _isResizing = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }
        // ========== 缩放处理 ==========
        private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
            {
                _isResizing = true;
                _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
                _resizeStartPoint = e.GetPosition(null);
                _resizeStartWidth = Width;
                _resizeStartHeight = Height;
                _resizeStartLeft = Left;
                _resizeStartTop = Top;
                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }
        private void HandleResize(Point currentPos)
        {
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;
            double deltaX = currentPos.X - _resizeStartPoint.X;
            double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _resizeStartPoint.Y;
            switch (_resizeDirection)
            {
                case "SE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "SW":
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthSW);
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "NE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNE);
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW":
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthNW);
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNW);
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    break;
                case "W":
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthW);
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S":
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "N":
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightN);
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }
        // ========== 闲置处理 ==========
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
        }
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }
        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }
        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                // 闲置状态降透明度
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);
                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = cx < sw / 2 ? -25 : sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }
        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }
        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }
        // ========== 展开/收缩动作 ==========
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();
            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;
            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);
            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));
            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }
        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;
            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120;
            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);
            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));
            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}

```csharp
using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;

namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; }

        // 拖拽状态
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private Point _dragStartPoint;
        private double _dragStartLeft;
        private double _dragStartTop;

        // 缩放状态
        private bool _isResizing = false;
        private string _resizeDirection = "";
        private Point _resizeStartPoint;
        private double _resizeStartWidth;
        private double _resizeStartHeight;
        private double _resizeStartLeft;
        private double _resizeStartTop;

        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }

        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }

        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }

        // ========== 拖拽处理 ==========
        private void Window_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (e.OriginalSource is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle)
            {
                // 如果点击的是缩放边缘矩形，不处理拖拽
                return;
            }

            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                // 未展开状态：开始拖拽
                _isDragging = true;
                _dragStartPoint = e.GetPosition(Owner ?? null);
                if (_dragStartPoint.X == 0 && _dragStartPoint.Y == 0)
                {
                    _dragStartPoint = e.GetPosition(null);
                }
                _dragStartLeft = Left;
                _dragStartTop = Top;
                
                CaptureMouse();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }

        private void Window_MouseMove(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                Point currentPos = e.GetPosition(null);
                double deltaX = currentPos.X - _dragStartPoint.X;
                double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _dragStartPoint.Y;

                Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
                Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
            }
            else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                HandleResize(e.GetPosition(null));
            }
        }

        private void Window_MouseLeftButtonUp(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isDragging)
            {
                _isDragging = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                
                // 磁吸到边缘
                if (!_isExpanded)
                {
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
            else if (_isResizing)
            {
                _isResizing = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }

        // ========== 缩放处理 ==========
        private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
            {
                _isResizing = true;
                _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
                _resizeStartPoint = e.GetPosition(null);
                _resizeStartWidth = Width;
                _resizeStartHeight = Height;
                _resizeStartLeft = Left;
                _resizeStartTop = Top;

                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }

        private void HandleResize(Point currentPos)
        {
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;

            double deltaX = currentPos.X - _resizeStartPoint.X;
            double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _resizeStartPoint.Y;

            switch (_resizeDirection)
            {
                case "SE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "SW":
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthSW);
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "NE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNE);
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW":
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthNW);
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNW);
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    break;
                case "W":
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthW);
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S":
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "N":
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightN);
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }

        // ========== 闲置处理 ==========
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
        }

        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }

        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }

        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                // 闲置状态降透明度
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);

                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = cx < sw / 2 ? -25 : sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }

        // ========== 展开/收缩动作 ==========
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;

            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);

            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }

        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;

            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);

            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}
```
