```xml
<Window x:Class="WebViewHub.FloatingIslandWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:controls="clr-namespace:WebViewHub.Controls"
        Title="调度台 - WebViewHub"
        Height="50" Width="50"
        MinHeight="50" MinWidth="50"
        WindowStyle="None"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="Transparent"
        Topmost="True"
        ShowInTaskbar="False"
        Loaded="Window_Loaded"
        Deactivated="Window_Deactivated"
        MouseLeftButtonDown="Window_MouseLeftButtonDown"
        MouseMove="Window_MouseMove"
        MouseLeftButtonUp="Window_MouseLeftButtonUp">

    <!-- 灵动球/展开面板复合体 -->
    <Border x:Name="FloatingIsland"
            CornerRadius="25"
            Background="#D9FFFFFF"
            BorderBrush="#E5E5E7"
            BorderThickness="1"
            MouseEnter="FloatingIsland_MouseEnter"
            MouseLeave="FloatingIsland_MouseLeave">
        <Border.Effect>
            <DropShadowEffect Color="#000000" Opacity="0.15" BlurRadius="20" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="270"/>
        </Border.Effect>

        <!-- 图标模式 -->
        <Grid x:Name="IconGrid" MouseLeftButtonUp="IconGrid_MouseLeftButtonUp" Cursor="Hand">
            <Image x:Name="FloatingIcon"
                   Source="pack://application:,,,/Assets/lucky_cat.png"
                   Width="28" Height="28"
                   HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                   VerticalAlignment="Center"
                   RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"
                   IsHitTestVisible="False"/>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 展开模式 - 使用 Grid 而不是覆盖 -->
        <Grid x:Name="FloatingPanel" Visibility="Collapsed">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="24"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
            
            <!-- 标题栏 -->
            <Grid Grid.Row="0" Background="Transparent" Cursor="SizeAll">
                <TextBlock Text="调度台指令" 
                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" 
                           VerticalAlignment="Center" 
                           Foreground="#888" 
                           FontSize="11" 
                           IsHitTestVisible="False" 
                           Margin="0,6,0,0"/>
            </Grid>

            <!-- 内容区域 -->
            <controls:CentralCommandPanel x:Name="CommandPanel" 
                                         Grid.Row="1" 
                                         Background="Transparent" 
                                         Margin="8,0,8,8"/>
            
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="W"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="E"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Height="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="N"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Height="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="S"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NE"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="14" Height="14" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SE"/>
        </Grid>
    </Border>
</Window>
```

<think>
Now I need to add the click handler in the code-behind to expand when clicked.

```csharp
using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;

namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; }

        // 拖拽状态
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private Point _dragStartPoint;
        private double _dragStartLeft;
        private double _dragStartTop;

        // 缩放状态
        private bool _isResizing = false;
        private string _resizeDirection = "";
        private Point _resizeStartPoint;
        private double _resizeStartWidth;
        private double _resizeStartHeight;
        private double _resizeStartLeft;
        private double _resizeStartTop;

        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }

        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }

        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }

        // ========== 拖拽处理 ==========
        private void Window_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (e.OriginalSource is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle)
            {
                // 如果点击的是缩放边缘矩形，不处理拖拽
                return;
            }

            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                // 未展开状态：开始拖拽
                _isDragging = true;
                _dragStartPoint = e.GetPosition(Owner ?? null);
                if (_dragStartPoint.X == 0 && _dragStartPoint.Y == 0)
                {
                    _dragStartPoint = e.GetPosition(null);
                }
                _dragStartLeft = Left;
                _dragStartTop = Top;
                
                CaptureMouse();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }

        // ========== 点击展开处理 ==========
        private void IconGrid_MouseLeftButtonUp(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isDragging && !_isExpanded)
            {
                // 如果没有发生拖拽，则展开
                Expand();
            }
            _isDragging = false;
        }

        private void Window_MouseMove(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                Point currentPos = e.GetPosition(null);
                double deltaX = currentPos.X - _dragStartPoint.X;
                double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _dragStartPoint.Y;

                Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
                Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
            }
            else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                HandleResize(e.GetPosition(null));
            }
        }

        private void Window_MouseLeftButtonUp(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isDragging)
            {
                _isDragging = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                
                // 磁吸到边缘
                if (!_isExpanded)
                {
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
            else if (_isResizing)
            {
                _isResizing = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }

        // ========== 缩放处理 ==========
        private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
            {
                _isResizing = true;
                _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
                _resizeStartPoint = e.GetPosition(null);
                _resizeStartWidth = Width;
                _resizeStartHeight = Height;
                _resizeStartLeft = Left;
                _resizeStartTop = Top;

                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }

        private void HandleResize(Point currentPos)
        {
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;

            double deltaX = currentPos.X - _resizeStartPoint.X;
            double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _resizeStartPoint.Y;

            switch (_resizeDirection)
            {
                case "SE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "SW":
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthSW);
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "NE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNE);
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW":
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthNW);
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNW);
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    break;
                case "W":
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthW);
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S":
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "N":
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightN);
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }

        // ========== 闲置处理 ==========
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
        }

        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }

        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }

        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                // 闲置状态降透明度
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);

                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = cx < sw / 2 ? -25 : sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }

        // ========== 展开/收缩动作 ==========
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;

            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);

            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }

        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;

            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);

            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}
```

```xml
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NE"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="14" Height="14" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SE"/>
        </Grid>
    </Border>
</Window>
```

```xml
<Window x:Class="WebViewHub.FloatingIslandWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:controls="clr-namespace:WebViewHub.Controls"
        Title="调度台 - WebViewHub"
        Height="50" Width="50"
        MinHeight="50" MinWidth="50"
        WindowStyle="None"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="Transparent"
        Topmost="True"
        ShowInTaskbar="False"
        Loaded="Window_Loaded"
        Deactivated="Window_Deactivated"
        MouseLeftButtonDown="Window_MouseLeftButtonDown"
        MouseMove="Window_MouseMove"
        MouseLeftButtonUp="Window_MouseLeftButtonUp">

    <!-- 灵动球/展开面板复合体 -->
    <Border x:Name="FloatingIsland"
            CornerRadius="25"
            Background="#D9FFFFFF"
            BorderBrush="#E5E5E7"
            BorderThickness="1"
            MouseEnter="FloatingIsland_MouseEnter"
            MouseLeave="FloatingIsland_MouseLeave">
        <Border.Effect>
            <DropShadowEffect Color="#000000" Opacity="0.15" BlurRadius="20" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="270"/>
        </Border.Effect>
        
        <Grid>
            <!-- 图标模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="IconGrid" MouseLeftButtonUp="IconGrid_MouseLeftButtonUp" Cursor="Hand">
                <Image x:Name="FloatingIcon"
                       Source="pack://application:,,,/Assets/lucky_cat.png"
                       Width="28" Height="28"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center"
                       RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"
                       IsHitTestVisible="False"/>
            </Grid>

            <!-- 展开模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="FloatingPanel" Visibility="Collapsed">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="24"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
            
            <!-- 标题栏 -->
            <Grid Grid.Row="0" Background="Transparent" Cursor="SizeAll">
                <TextBlock Text="调度台指令" 
                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" 
                           VerticalAlignment="Center" 
                           Foreground="#888" 
                           FontSize="11" 
                           IsHitTestVisible="False"

            <controls:CentralCommandPanel x:Name="CommandPanel"

            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Top"

                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="N"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"

                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"

            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"

            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右上 -->
```

应用程序已启动！我做了以下修复：

## 修复内容

1. **拖拽, the application has been started. Let me summarize the fixes that were made.功能**：使用窗口级鼠标事件 (`Window_MouseLeftButtonDown/Move/Up`) 替代不可靠的 Thumb 控件
   - 收起状态下点击可拖动
   - 拖动后释放会自动磁吸到屏幕边缘

2. **缩放功能**：使用透明 Rectangle 边缘替代 Thumb
   - 展开后四周+四角都有透明缩放区域
   - 支持 8 个方向调整大小

3. **点击展开**：添加了 `IconGrid_MouseLeftButtonUp` 处理
   - 收起状态下点击图标会展开为中控台

让我修复抖动和点击展开的问题：
 the drag and click handling to be more stable.

<think>
I see the issues:1. **Jitter during dragging**: The problem is that we're using `e.GetPosition(null)` which returns the position relative to the entire screen, but we should use the screen coordinates more directly. Also the issue might be with `Owner` being null.2. **Click to expand not working**: The `IconGrid_MouseLeftButtonUp` event might not be firing because we're capturing the mouse on `MouseLeftButtonDown`, so the click event gets consumed by the capture.Let me fix these issues:
1. Use `System.Windows.Forms.Control.MousePosition` or use the raw mouse delta instead of calculating from position
2. Instead of using mouse capture for dragging, use a simpler approach - just track whether the mouse moved more than a small threshold
3. For click to expand - use PreviewMouseLeftButtonUp on the IconGrid instead, or handle it differently<think>
 Thinking...
 "using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;
namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; }
        // 拖拽状态
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private Point _lastMousePosition;
        private double _dragStartLeft;
        private double _dragStartTop;
        // 缩放状态
        private bool _isResizing = false;
        private string _resizeDirection = "";
        private Point _resizeStartPoint;
        private double _resizeStartWidth;
        private double _resizeStartHeight;
        private double _resizeStartLeft;
        private double _resizeStartTop;
        // 点击判定
        private bool _hasMoved = false;
        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }
        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }
        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }
        // ========== 拖拽处理 ==========
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(e);
            if (e.OriginalSource is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle)
            {
                // 如果点击的是缩放边缘矩形，不处理拖拽
                return;
            }
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _isDragging = true;
                _hasMoved = false;
                _dragStartLeft = Left;
                _dragStartTop = Top;
                _lastMousePosition = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                
                CaptureMouse();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
        }
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseMove(MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseMove(e);
            if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                Point currentPos = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                double deltaX = currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X;
                double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _lastMousePosition.Y;
                // 记录是否发生了实际移动
                if (Math.Abs(deltaX) > 2 || Math.Abs(deltaY) > 2)
                {
                    _hasMoved = true;
                }
                Left = _dragStartLeft + (currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X);
                Top = _dragStartTop + (currentPos.Y - _lastMousePosition.Y);
            }
            else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                HandleResize(Mouse.GetPosition(this));
            }
        }
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(e);
            if (_isDragging)
            {
                _isDragging = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                
                // 如果没有发生移动，则展开
                if (!_hasMoved && !_isExpanded)
                {
                    Expand();
                }
                else if (!_isExpanded)
                {
                    // 磁吸到边缘
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
            else if (_isResizing)
            {
                _isResizing = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
        }
        // ========== 缩放处理 ==========
        private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
            {
                _isResizing = true;
                _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
                _resizeStartPoint = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                _resizeStartWidth = Width;
                _resizeStartHeight = Height;
                _resizeStartLeft = Left;
                _resizeStartTop = Top;
                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }
        private void HandleResize(Point currentPos)
        {
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;
            double deltaX = currentPos.X - _resizeStartPoint.X;
            double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _resizeStartPoint.Y;
            switch (_resizeDirection)
            {
                case "SE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "SW":
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthSW);
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "NE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNE);
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW":
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthNW);
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNW);
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    break;
                case "W":
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthW);
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S":
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "N":
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightN);
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }
        // ========== 闲置处理 ==========
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
        }
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }
        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }
        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                // 闲置状态降透明度
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);
                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = cx < sw / 2 ? -25 : sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }
        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }
        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }
        // ========== 展开/收缩动作 ==========
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();
            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;
            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);
            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));
            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }
        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;
            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120;
            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);
            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));
            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}

</think>


```csharp
using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;

namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; }

        // 拖拽状态
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private Point _lastMousePosition;
        private double _dragStartLeft;
        private double _dragStartTop;

        // 缩放状态
        private bool _isResizing = false;
        private string _resizeDirection = "";
        private Point _resizeStartPoint;
        private double _resizeStartWidth;
        private double _resizeStartHeight;
        private double _resizeStartLeft;
        private double _resizeStartTop;

        // 点击判定
        private bool _hasMoved = false;

        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }

        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }

        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }

        // ========== 拖拽处理 ==========
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(e);

            if (e.OriginalSource is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle)
            {
                // 如果点击的是缩放边缘矩形，不处理拖拽
                return;
            }

            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _isDragging = true;
                _hasMoved = false;
                _dragStartLeft = Left;
                _dragStartTop = Top;
                _lastMousePosition = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                
                CaptureMouse();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
        }

        protected override void OnPreviewMouseMove(MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseMove(e);

            if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                Point currentPos = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                double deltaX = currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X;
                double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _lastMousePosition.Y;

                // 记录是否发生了实际移动
                if (Math.Abs(deltaX) > 2 || Math.Abs(deltaY) > 2)
                {
                    _hasMoved = true;
                }

                Left = _dragStartLeft + (currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X);
                Top = _dragStartTop + (currentPos.Y - _lastMousePosition.Y);
            }
            else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                HandleResize(Mouse.GetPosition(this));
            }
        }

        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(e);

            if (_isDragging)
            {
                _isDragging = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                
                // 如果没有发生移动，则展开
                if (!_hasMoved && !_isExpanded)
                {
                    Expand();
                }
                else if (!_isExpanded)
                {
                    // 磁吸到边缘
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
            else if (_isResizing)
            {
                _isResizing = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
        }

        // ========== 缩放处理 ==========
        private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
            {
                _isResizing = true;
                _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
                _resizeStartPoint = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                _resizeStartWidth = Width;
                _resizeStartHeight = Height;
                _resizeStartLeft = Left;
                _resizeStartTop = Top;

                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }

        private void HandleResize(Point currentPos)
        {
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;

            double deltaX = currentPos.X - _resizeStartPoint.X;
            double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _resizeStartPoint.Y;

            switch (_resizeDirection)
            {
                case "SE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "SW":
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthSW);
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "NE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNE);
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW":
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthNW);
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNW);
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    break;
                case "W":
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthW);
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S":
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "N":
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightN);
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }

        // ========== 闲置处理 ==========
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
        }

        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }

        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }

        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                // 闲置状态降透明度
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);

                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = cx < sw / 2 ? -25 : sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }

        // ========== 展开/收缩动作 ==========
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;

            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);

            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }

        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;

            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);

            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}

```

I methods instead. need to remove the old event handlers from XAML since we're now using OnPreview* override methods.


```xml
<Window x:Class="WebViewHub.FloatingIslandWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:controls="clr-namespace:WebViewHub.Controls"
        Title="调度台 - WebViewHub"
        Height="50" Width="50"
        MinHeight="50" MinWidth="50"
        WindowStyle="None"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="Transparent"
        Topmost="True"
        ShowInTaskbar="False"
        Loaded="Window_Loaded"
        Deactivated="Window_Deactivated">

    <!-- 灵动球/展开面板复合体 -->
    <Border x:Name="FloatingIsland"
            CornerRadius="25"
            Background="#D9FFFFFF"
            BorderBrush="#E5E5E7"
            BorderThickness="1"
            MouseEnter="FloatingIsland_MouseEnter"
            MouseLeave="FloatingIsland_MouseLeave">
        <Border.Effect>
            <DropShadowEffect Color="#000000" Opacity="0.15" BlurRadius="20" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="270"/>
        </Border.Effect>
        
        <Grid>
            <!-- 图标模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="IconGrid" MouseLeftButtonUp="IconGrid_MouseLeftButtonUp" Cursor="Hand">
                <Image x:Name="FloatingIcon"
                       Source="pack://application:,,,/Assets/lucky_cat.png"
                       Width="28" Height="28"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center"
                       RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"
                       IsHitTestVisible="False"/>
            </Grid>

            <!-- 展开模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="FloatingPanel" Visibility="Collapsed">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="24"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
            
            <!-- 标题栏 -->
            <Grid Grid.Row="0" Background="Transparent" Cursor="SizeAll">
                <TextBlock Text="调度台指令" 
                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" 
                           VerticalAlignment="Center" 
                           Foreground="#888" 
                           FontSize="11" 
                           IsHitTestVisible="False" 
                           Margin="0,6,0,0"/>
            </Grid>

            <!-- 内容区域 -->
            <controls:CentralCommandPanel x:Name="CommandPanel" 
                                         Grid.Row="1" 
                                         Background="Transparent" 
                                         Margin="8,0,8,8"/>
            
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="W"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="E"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Height="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="N"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Height="6" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="S"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NE"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="10" Height="10" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="14" Height="14" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SE"/>
        </Grid>
        </Grid>
    </Border>
</Window>

```

3. Added click-to-expand functionality: if the user clicks but doesn't drag (movement < 2 pixels), it will expand the floating island

 Thinking...
 "using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;
namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; }
        // 拖拽状态
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private Point _lastMousePosition;
        private double _dragStartLeft;
        private double _dragStartTop;
        // 缩放状态
        private bool _isResizing = false;
        private string _resizeDirection = "";
        private Point _resizeStartPoint;
        private double _resizeStartWidth;
        private double _resizeStartHeight;
        private double _resizeStartLeft;
        private double _resizeStartTop;
        // 点击判定
        private bool _hasMoved = false;
        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }
        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }
        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }
        // ========== 拖拽处理 - 收起状态 ==========
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(e);
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                // 展开状态下，点击标题栏区域才开始拖拽
                var pos = e.GetPosition(FloatingPanel);
                if (pos.Y <= 24) // 标题栏区域内
                {
                    _isDragging = true;
                    _hasMoved = false;
                    _dragStartLeft = Left;
                    _dragStartTop = Top;
                    _lastMousePosition = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                    CaptureMouse();
                    e.Handled = true;
                }
                // 否则让CommandPanel处理点击
                return;
            }
            // 收起状态
            if (e.OriginalSource is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle)
            {
                return;
            }
            _isDragging = true;
            _hasMoved = false;
            _dragStartLeft = Left;
            _dragStartTop = Top;
            _lastMousePosition = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
            
            CaptureMouse();
            RestartInactiveTimer();
            ResetOpacity();
            e.Handled = true;
        }
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseMove(MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseMove(e);
            if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                Point currentPos = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                double deltaX = currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X;
                double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _lastMousePosition.Y;
                if (Math.Abs(deltaX) > 1 || Math.Abs(deltaY) > 1)
                {
                    _hasMoved = true;
                }
                Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
                Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
            }
            else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                HandleResize(Mouse.GetPosition(this));
            }
        }
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(e);
            if (_isDragging)
            {
                _isDragging = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                
                // 收起状态：没有移动=点击，有移动=拖拽
                if (!_isExpanded && !_hasMoved)
                {
                    Expand();
                }
                else if (!_isExpanded && _hasMoved)
                {
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
                // 展开状态：有移动就更新位置，无移动就让CommandPanel处理
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
            else if (_isResizing)
            {
                _isResizing = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
        }
        // ========== 缩放处理 ==========
        private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
            {
                _isResizing = true;
                _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
                _resizeStartPoint = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                _resizeStartWidth = Width;
                _resizeStartHeight = Height;
                _resizeStartLeft = Left;
                _resizeStartTop = Top;
                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }
        private void HandleResize(Point currentPos)
        {
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;
            double deltaX = currentPos.X - _resizeStartPoint.X;
            double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _resizeStartPoint.Y;
            switch (_resizeDirection)
            {
                case "SE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "SW":
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthSW);
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "NE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNE);
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW":
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthNW);
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNW);
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    break;
                case "W":
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthW);
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S":
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "N":
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightN);
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }
        // ========== 闲置处理 ==========
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
        }
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }
        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }
        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                // 闲置状态降透明度
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);
                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = cx < sw / 2 ? -25 : sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }
        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }
        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }
        // ========== 展开/收缩动作 ==========
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();
            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;
            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);
            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));
            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }
        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;
            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120;
            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);
            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));
            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}
