 Let me add that.

```csharp
using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;

namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; }

        // 拖拽状态
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private Point _lastMousePosition;
        private double _dragStartLeft;
        private double _dragStartTop;

        // 缩放状态
        private bool _isResizing = false;
        private string _resizeDirection = "";
        private Point _resizeStartPoint;
        private double _resizeStartWidth;
        private double _resizeStartHeight;
        private double _resizeStartLeft;
        private double _resizeStartTop;

        // 点击判定
        private bool _hasMoved = false;

        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }

        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }

        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }

        // ========== 拖拽处理 - 收起状态 ==========
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(e);

            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                // 展开状态下，点击标题栏区域才开始拖拽
                var pos = e.GetPosition(FloatingPanel);
                if (pos.Y <= 24) // 标题栏区域内
                {
                    _isDragging = true;
                    _hasMoved = false;
                    _dragStartLeft = Left;
                    _dragStartTop = Top;
                    _lastMousePosition = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                    CaptureMouse();
                    e.Handled = true;
                }
                // 否则让CommandPanel处理点击
                return;
            }

            // 收起状态
            if (e.OriginalSource is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle)
            {
                return;
            }

            _isDragging = true;
            _hasMoved = false;
            _dragStartLeft = Left;
            _dragStartTop = Top;
            _lastMousePosition = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
            
            CaptureMouse();
            RestartInactiveTimer();
            ResetOpacity();
            e.Handled = true;
        }

        protected override void OnPreviewMouseMove(MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseMove(e);

            if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                Point currentPos = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                double deltaX = currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X;
                double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _lastMousePosition.Y;

                if (Math.Abs(deltaX) > 1 || Math.Abs(deltaY) > 1)
                {
                    _hasMoved = true;
                }

                Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
                Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
            }
            else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                HandleResize(Mouse.GetPosition(this));
            }
        }

        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(e);

            if (_isDragging)
            {
                _isDragging = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                
                // 收起状态：没有移动=点击，有移动=拖拽
                if (!_isExpanded && !_hasMoved)
                {
                    Expand();
                }
                else if (!_isExpanded && _hasMoved)
                {
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
                // 展开状态：有移动就更新位置，无移动就让CommandPanel处理
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
            else if (_isResizing)
            {
                _isResizing = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
        }

        // ========== 缩放处理 ==========
        private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
            {
                _isResizing = true;
                _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
                _resizeStartPoint = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                _resizeStartWidth = Width;
                _resizeStartHeight = Height;
                _resizeStartLeft = Left;
                _resizeStartTop = Top;

                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }

        private void HandleResize(Point currentPos)
        {
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;

            double deltaX = currentPos.X - _resizeStartPoint.X;
            double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _resizeStartPoint.Y;

            switch (_resizeDirection)
            {
                case "SE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "SW":
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthSW);
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "NE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNE);
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW":
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthNW);
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNW);
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    break;
                case "W":
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthW);
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S":
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "N":
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightN);
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }

        // ========== 闲置处理 ==========
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
        }

        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }

        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }

        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                // 闲置状态降透明度
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);

                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = cx < sw / 2 ? -25 : sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }

        // ========== 展开/收缩动作 ==========
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;

            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);

            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }

        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;

            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);

            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}
```

</think>

Let me also ensure the title bar Grid has proper hit test for drag.让缩放区域在 CommandPanel 之上，并给标题栏添加正确的拖拽处理。让我修复 XAML：
Let me also fix the XAML to ensure resize areas are on top:


```xml
<Window x:Class="WebViewHub.FloatingIslandWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:controls="clr-namespace:WebViewHub.Controls"
        Title="调度台 - WebViewHub"
        Height="50" Width="50"
        MinHeight="50" MinWidth="50"
        WindowStyle="None"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="Transparent"
        Topmost="True"
        ShowInTaskbar="False"
        Loaded="Window_Loaded"
        Deactivated="Window_Deactivated">

    <!-- 灵动球/展开面板复合体 -->
    <Border x:Name="FloatingIsland"
            CornerRadius="25"
            Background="#D9FFFFFF"
            BorderBrush="#E5E5E7"
            BorderThickness="1"
            MouseEnter="FloatingIsland_MouseEnter"
            MouseLeave="FloatingIsland_MouseLeave">
        <Border.Effect>
            <DropShadowEffect Color="#000000" Opacity="0.15" BlurRadius="20" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="270"/>
        </Border.Effect>
        
        <Grid>
            <!-- 图标模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="IconGrid" Cursor="Hand">
                <Image x:Name="FloatingIcon"
                       Source="pack://application:,,,/Assets/lucky_cat.png"
                       Width="28" Height="28"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center"
                       RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"
                       IsHitTestVisible="False"/>
            </Grid>

            <!-- 展开模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="FloatingPanel" Visibility="Collapsed" Panel.ZIndex="1">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="24"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
            
            <!-- 标题栏 - 拖拽区域 -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="Transparent" Cursor="SizeAll" MouseLeftButtonDown="TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown">
                <TextBlock Text="调度台指令" 
                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" 
                           VerticalAlignment="Center" 
                           Foreground="#888" 
                           FontSize="11" 
                           IsHitTestVisible="False" 
                           Margin="0,6,0,0"/>
            </Border>

            <!-- 内容区域 -->
            <controls:CentralCommandPanel x:Name="CommandPanel" 
                                         Grid.Row="1" 
                                         Background="Transparent" 
                                         Margin="8,0,8,8"/>
            
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="8" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="W"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="8" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="E"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Height="8" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="N"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Height="8" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="S"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="12" Height="12" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="12" Height="12" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NE"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="12" Height="12" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="16" Height="16" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SE"/>
        </Grid>
        </Grid>
    </Border>
</Window>
```

现在添加标题栏的拖拽处理方法 need to add the TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown event handler to the code-behind. Let me add it.：
Now add the title bar drag handler:


```csharp
using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;

namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; }

        // 拖拽状态
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private Point _lastMousePosition;
        private double _dragStartLeft;
        private double _dragStartTop;

        // 缩放状态
        private bool _isResizing = false;
        private string _resizeDirection = "";
        private Point _resizeStartPoint;
        private double _resizeStartWidth;
        private double _resizeStartHeight;
        private double _resizeStartLeft;
        private double _resizeStartTop;

        // 点击判定
        private bool _hasMoved = false;

        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }

        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }

        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }

        // ========== 拖拽处理 - 收起状态 ==========
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(e);

            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                // 展开状态下，点击标题栏区域才开始拖拽
                var pos = e.GetPosition(FloatingPanel);
                if (pos.Y <= 24) // 标题栏区域内
                {
                    _isDragging = true;
                    _hasMoved = false;
                    _dragStartLeft = Left;
                    _dragStartTop = Top;
                    _lastMousePosition = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                    CaptureMouse();
                    e.Handled = true;
                }
                // 否则让CommandPanel处理点击
                return;
            }

            // 收起状态
            if (e.OriginalSource is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle)
            {
                return;
            }

            _isDragging = true;
            _hasMoved = false;
            _dragStartLeft = Left;
            _dragStartTop = Top;
            _lastMousePosition = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
            
            CaptureMouse();
            RestartInactiveTimer();
            ResetOpacity();
            e.Handled = true;
        }

        protected override void OnPreviewMouseMove(MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseMove(e);

            if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                Point currentPos = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                double deltaX = currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X;
                double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _lastMousePosition.Y;

                if (Math.Abs(deltaX) > 1 || Math.Abs(deltaY) > 1)
                {
                    _hasMoved = true;
                }

                Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
                Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
            }
            else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                HandleResize(Mouse.GetPosition(this));
            }
        }

        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(e);

            if (_isDragging)
            {
                _isDragging = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                
                // 收起状态：没有移动=点击，有移动=拖拽
                if (!_isExpanded && !_hasMoved)
                {
                    Expand();
                }
                else if (!_isExpanded && _hasMoved)
                {
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
                // 展开状态：有移动就更新位置，无移动就让CommandPanel处理
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
            else if (_isResizing)
            {
                _isResizing = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
        }

        // ========== 缩放处理 ==========
        private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
            {
                _isResizing = true;
                _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
                _resizeStartPoint = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                _resizeStartWidth = Width;
                _resizeStartHeight = Height;
                _resizeStartLeft = Left;
                _resizeStartTop = Top;

                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }

        // ========== 标题栏拖拽处理 ==========
        private void TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                _isDragging = true;
                _hasMoved = false;
                _dragStartLeft = Left;
                _dragStartTop = Top;
                _lastMousePosition = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }

        private void HandleResize(Point currentPos)
        {
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;

            double deltaX = currentPos.X - _resizeStartPoint.X;
            double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _resizeStartPoint.Y;

            switch (_resizeDirection)
            {
                case "SE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "SW":
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthSW);
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "NE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNE);
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW":
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthNW);
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNW);
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    break;
                case "W":
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthW);
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S":
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "N":
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightN);
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }

        // ========== 闲置处理 ==========
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
        }

        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }

        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }

        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                // 闲置状态降透明度
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);

                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = cx < sw / 2 ? -25 : sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }

        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }

        // ========== 展开/收缩动作 ==========
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;

            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);

            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }

        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;

            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;

            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120;

            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);

            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));

            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };

            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);

            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}

```

```xml
<Window x:Class="WebViewHub.FloatingIslandWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:controls="clr-namespace:WebViewHub.Controls"
        Title="调度台 - WebViewHub"
        Height="50" Width="50"
        MinHeight="50" MinWidth="50"
        WindowStyle="None"
        AllowsTransparency="True"
        Background="Transparent"
        Topmost="True"
        ShowInTaskbar="False"
        Loaded="Window_Loaded"
        Deactivated="Window_Deactivated">

    <!-- 灵动球/展开面板复合体 -->
    <Border x:Name="FloatingIsland"
            CornerRadius="25"
            Background="#D9FFFFFF"
            BorderBrush="#E5E5E7"
            BorderThickness="1"
            MouseEnter="FloatingIsland_MouseEnter"
            MouseLeave="FloatingIsland_MouseLeave">
        <Border.Effect>
            <DropShadowEffect Color="#000000" Opacity="0.15" BlurRadius="20" ShadowDepth="4" Direction="270"/>
        </Border.Effect>
        
        <Grid>
            <!-- 图标模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="IconGrid" Cursor="Hand" Panel.ZIndex="1">
                <Image x:Name="FloatingIcon"
                       Source="pack://application:,,,/Assets/lucky_cat.png"
                       Width="28" Height="28"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Center"
                       VerticalAlignment="Center"
                       RenderOptions.BitmapScalingMode="HighQuality"
                       IsHitTestVisible="False"/>
            </Grid>

            <!-- 展开模式 -->
            <Grid x:Name="FloatingPanel" Visibility="Collapsed" Panel.ZIndex="1">
            <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                <RowDefinition Height="24"/>
                <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            </Grid.RowDefinitions>
            
            <!-- 标题栏 - 拖拽区域 -->
            <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="Transparent" Cursor="SizeAll" MouseLeftButtonDown="TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown">
                <TextBlock Text="调度台指令" 
                           HorizontalAlignment="Center" 
                           VerticalAlignment="Center" 
                           Foreground="#888" 
                           FontSize="11" 
                           IsHitTestVisible="False" 
                           Margin="0,6,0,0"/>
            </Border>

            <!-- 内容区域 -->
            <controls:CentralCommandPanel x:Name="CommandPanel" 
                                         Grid.Row="1" 
                                         Background="Transparent" 
                                         Margin="8,0,8,8"/>
            
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="8" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="W"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
                       Width="8" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="E"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Height="8" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="N"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Height="8" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNS"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="S"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="12" Height="12" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右上 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Top"
                       Width="12" Height="12" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="NE"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="12" Height="12" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNESW"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SW"/>
            <!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右下 -->
            <Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                       HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Bottom"
                       Width="16" Height="16" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeNWSE"
                       MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
                       Tag="SE"/>
        </Grid>
        </Grid>
    </Border>
</Window>
```

<think>
用户说还有抖动问题，而且聊天窗口（展开后的中控台）无法缩放。用户让我先不要改，解释一下技术方案。

好的，让我解释一下当前的技术实现：

## 当前实现

### 1当前的技术实现：. 拖拽技术
- 使用 WPF 的 `OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown/Move/Up` 事件处理
- 鼠标位置用 `Mouse.GetPosition(this)` 获取
- 通过 `_lastMousePosition` 记录初始位置，计算 delta 来移动窗口

### 2. 缩放技术
- 在展开模式下，使用 8 个透明的 `Rectangle` 作为缩放边缘（左/右/上/下 + 四角）
- 每个 Rectangle 有 `MouseLeftButtonDown` 事件，触发 `ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown`
- 根据 Rectangle 的 `Tag` 属性（N/S/E/W/NW/NE/SW/SE）来决定缩放方向

### 3. 可能的问题

**抖动原因**：
- 可能是 `Mouse.GetPosition(this)` 和 `Left/Top` 坐标系统不一致
- 或者动画（`SnapToEdge`、`InactiveTimer` 的移动动画）干扰了拖拽

**缩放不工作的可能原因**：
1. **ZIndex 问题**：缩放 Rectangle 可能被 `CommandPanel` 遮挡
2. **事件被拦截**：CommandPanel 内部元素可能捕获了鼠标事件
3. **展开后布局**：Grid 嵌套结构可能影响了命中测试

---

你希望我继续修复，还是你有其他想法？

---

**User**

从你描述的实现来看，这是一个 **WPF 自定义窗口拖拽 + Resize 逻辑**。整体思路是常见做法，但确实有几个容易导致 **抖动 / Resize 不触发 / 命中失败** 的结构性问题。下面按你列出的三个部分逐条分析。

---

# 一、拖拽实现的问题分析

你现在的逻辑：

* `OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown`
* `OnPreviewMouseMove`
* `OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp`
* `Mouse.GetPosition(this)`
* `_lastMousePosition` 算 delta
* 修改 `Left / Top`

这个实现最大的问题通常是 **坐标系不一致**。

### 1 坐标系问题（最常见）

`Mouse.GetPosition(this)` 返回的是：

```
相对于当前元素的坐标
```

但 `Window.Left / Top` 是：

```
屏幕坐标（Screen Coordinates）
```

如果窗口正在移动，你每次计算 `delta` 时：

```
当前鼠标相对于窗口的位置
```

会发生变化。

例如：

```
第一次：
mouse = (200,100) relative window

窗口移动后

第二次：
mouse = (180,95) relative window
```

delta 就会错误，从而产生 **抖动 / 跳动**。

### 正确方案

拖拽窗口时应该使用：

```
Point screen = PointToScreen(Mouse.GetPosition(this))
```

或直接：

```
System.Windows.Forms.Cursor.Position
```

计算逻辑：

```
delta = screenNow - screenStart
```

然后

```
Left = startLeft + deltaX
Top  = startTop  + deltaY
```

这样拖拽会非常稳定。

---

### 2 Mouse Capture 问题

如果没有调用：

```
CaptureMouse()
```

在拖动过程中：

* 鼠标移出控件
* 或其他元素抢占输入

`MouseMove` 可能停止触发。

正确流程：

```
MouseDown
  -> CaptureMouse()

MouseUp
  -> ReleaseMouseCapture()
```

---

### 3 Preview 事件的副作用

你现在使用：

```
PreviewMouseLeftButtonDown
PreviewMouseMove
```

Preview 是 **Tunnel 事件**。

如果内部控件（按钮等）调用：

```
e.Handled = true
```

可能导致拖拽逻辑被影响。

通常建议：

```
MouseLeftButtonDown
MouseMove
MouseLeftButtonUp
```

只在必要时用 Preview。

---

# 二、Resize 不工作的原因分析

你说：

> 用 8 个透明 Rectangle 做 Resize Border

这种方式是常见方案，但有几个常见坑。

---

# 1 ZIndex 被覆盖

如果布局类似：

```
Grid
 ├ CommandPanel
 ├ ResizeBorder (Rectangle)
```

而 CommandPanel 在视觉树 **后面**，但 **ZIndex 更高**：

```
Panel.ZIndex
```

就会出现：

```
Rectangle 看得见
但点击不到
```

解决：

```
Panel.ZIndex="1000"
```

或者：

```
ResizeBorder 放在最上层 Grid
```

---

# 2 HitTest 失败（透明元素）

WPF 有一个坑：

```
Fill = Transparent
```

才可以接收鼠标事件。

如果是：

```
Fill = null
```

则 **不会命中**。

正确写法：

```
<Rectangle Fill="Transparent"/>
```

否则 MouseDown 不会触发。

---

# 3 CommandPanel 捕获鼠标

如果内部控件调用：

```
CaptureMouse()
```

可能导致 Resize Rectangle 收不到事件。

可以在 ResizeBorder MouseDown 时：

```
e.Handled = true
```

阻止事件继续传递。

---

# 4 Grid Layout 导致命中区域不正确

你说：

> Grid 嵌套结构可能影响命中测试

确实可能。

常见问题：

```
Grid
 ├ Content
 └ ResizeBorder
```

但 ResizeBorder 的 `HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"`。

结果：

```
实际宽度是 0
```

例如：

```
Width=5
HorizontalAlignment=Left
```

否则 Resize 边缘可能不可点击。

---

# 三、拖拽抖动的另一个隐藏原因

你提到：

> SnapToEdge
> InactiveTimer 的移动动画

这 **很可能是真正原因**。

如果拖拽时：

```
Window.Left += delta
```

同时动画在运行：

```
DoubleAnimation -> Left
```

WPF 会发生：

```
Layout + Animation 同时修改属性
```

表现为：

```
窗口抖动 / 回弹
```

解决办法：

拖拽开始时：

```
BeginAnimation(Window.LeftProperty, null)
BeginAnimation(Window.TopProperty, null)
```

停止所有动画。

---

# 四、Resize 逻辑本身可能的问题

你用：

```
Tag = N S E W NW NE SW SE
```

这是合理的。

但很多实现忽略一个关键点：

**Resize 时必须同时调整 Left/Top 和 Width/Height**

例如：

左边拖动：

```
Left += deltaX
Width -= deltaX
```

右边拖动：

```
Width += deltaX
```

上边拖动：

```
Top += deltaY
Height -= deltaY
```

如果只改 Width：

窗口会错位。

---

# 五、推荐的稳定实现结构

建议结构：

```
Window
 └ Grid Root
     ├ ContentPanel
     ├ ResizeBorder_N
     ├ ResizeBorder_S
     ├ ResizeBorder_E
     ├ ResizeBorder_W
     ├ ResizeBorder_NE
     ├ ResizeBorder_NW
     ├ ResizeBorder_SE
     └ ResizeBorder_SW
```

每个：

```
Width=5 / Height=5
Fill=Transparent
Cursor=SizeWE / SizeNS / SizeNWSE
Panel.ZIndex=999
```

---

# 六、最稳定的方案（推荐）

如果你不是做 **完全无边框窗口**，其实可以直接使用系统 API：

```
HwndSource
WM_NCHITTEST
```

返回：

```
HTLEFT
HTRIGHT
HTTOP
HTBOTTOM
HTTOPLEFT
...
```

优点：

* 系统级 Resize
* 无抖动
* 支持 DPI
* 性能最好

这是很多 WPF 框架（如 MahApps）使用的方法。

---

# 七、总结（核心问题）

你现在的问题大概率来自这几个：

**拖拽抖动**

1️⃣ `Mouse.GetPosition(this)` 坐标系错误
2️⃣ 拖拽时动画仍在运行
3️⃣ 没有 Mouse Capture

**Resize 不触发**

4️⃣ Rectangle `Fill` 不是 Transparent
5️⃣ ZIndex 被 CommandPanel 覆盖
6️⃣ Grid Stretch 导致边缘宽度为 0
7️⃣ 内部控件拦截鼠标

---

如果你愿意，可以把 **这三个代码片段发出来**，我可以直接帮你定位问题：

1️⃣ `OnPreviewMouseMove` 拖拽代码
2️⃣ `ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown` 代码
3️⃣ Resize Rectangle 的 XAML 布局

我可以直接指出 **具体哪一行导致问题**。

好的，让我提供这三个关键代码片段：

##事件捕获问题

让我把相关代码发给用户分析。 1. OnPreviewMouseMove 拖拽代码

```csharp:95:115:E:\ProjectMy\WebViewHub\FloatingIslandWindow.xaml.cs
protected override void OnPreviewMouseMove(MouseEventArgs e)
{
    base.OnPreviewMouseMove(e);

    if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
    {
        Point currentPos = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
        double deltaX = currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X;
        double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _lastMousePosition.Y;

        if (Math.Abs(deltaX) > 1 || Math.Abs(deltaY) > 1)
        {
            _hasMoved = true;
        }

        Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
        Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
    }
    else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
    {
        HandleResize(Mouse.GetPosition(this));
    }
}
```

## 2. ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown 代码

```csharp:148:168:E:\ProjectMy\WebViewHub\FloatingIslandWindow.xaml.cs
private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
{
    if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
    {
        _isResizing = true;
        _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
        _resizeStartPoint = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
        _resizeStartWidth = Width;
        _resizeStartHeight = Height;
        _resizeStartLeft = Left;
        _resizeStartTop = Top;

        CaptureMouse();
        e.Handled = true;
        RestartInactiveTimer();
        ResetOpacity();
    }
}
```

## 3. Resize Rectangle 的 XAML 布局

```xaml:64:111:E:\ProjectMy\WebViewHub\FloatingIslandWindow.xaml
<!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 左 -->
<Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
           HorizontalAlignment="Left" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
           Width="8" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
           MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
           Tag="W"/>
<!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右 -->
<Rectangle Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
           HorizontalAlignment="Right" VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
           Width="8" Fill="Transparent" Cursor="SizeWE"
           MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
           Tag="E"/>
<!-- 其他省略... -->
```

根据你的分析，我怀疑问题在于：

1. **拖拽抖动**：`Mouse.GetPosition(this)` 坐标系问题，且没有在拖拽开始时停止动画
2. **Resize 不工作**：`Fill="Transparent"` 应该是对的，但可能缺少 `Panel.ZIndex`

你想让我按你的建议修改吗？

```plaintext
protected override void OnPreviewMouseMove(MouseEventArgs e)
{
    base.OnPreviewMouseMove(e);

    if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
    {
        Point currentPos = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
        double deltaX = currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X;
        double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _lastMousePosition.Y;

        if (Math.Abs(deltaX) > 1 || Math.Abs(deltaY) > 1)
        {
            _hasMoved = true;
        }

        Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
        Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
    }
    else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
    {
        HandleResize(Mouse.GetPosition(this));
    }
}
```

```plaintext
private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
{
    if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
    {
        _isResizing = true;
        _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
        _resizeStartPoint = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
        _resizeStartWidth = Width;
        _resizeStartHeight = Height;
        _resizeStartLeft = Left;
        _resizeStartTop = Top;

        CaptureMouse();
        e.Handled = true;
        RestartInactiveTimer();
        ResetOpacity();
    }
}
```

```plaintext
           Tag="W"/>
<!-- 缩放边缘区域 - 右 -->
```

**User**

从你贴的代码看，**问题基本已经可以定位**，而且不止一个。下面我按优先级把真正会导致问题的点逐个拆开。

---

# 一、拖拽抖动的核心问题

你的代码：

```csharp
Point currentPos = Mouse.GetPosition(this);

double deltaX = currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X;
double deltaY = currentPos.Y - _lastMousePosition.Y;

Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
```

### 问题 1：坐标系是错的

`Mouse.GetPosition(this)` 是：

```
相对 Window 的坐标
```

但 `Left / Top` 是：

```
屏幕坐标
```

当窗口移动时，鼠标相对窗口的位置会变化。

举例：

```
初始
鼠标相对窗口 = (300,200)

窗口移动10px

下一帧
鼠标相对窗口 = (290,200)
```

于是：

```
deltaX = -10
```

窗口就会 **往回跳**，形成抖动。

---

## 正确实现

拖拽必须使用 **屏幕坐标**。

### 拖拽开始

```csharp
_dragStartMouse = PointToScreen(Mouse.GetPosition(this));
_dragStartLeft = Left;
_dragStartTop = Top;
CaptureMouse();
```

### MouseMove

```csharp
Point screenPos = PointToScreen(Mouse.GetPosition(this));

double deltaX = screenPos.X - _dragStartMouse.X;
double deltaY = screenPos.Y - _dragStartMouse.Y;

Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
```

这样拖拽会 **完全稳定**。

---

# 二、你代码里的第二个 Bug

你的代码：

```csharp
Point currentPos = Mouse.GetPosition(this);

double deltaX = currentPos.X - _lastMousePosition.X;
```

但 **MouseMove 里没有更新 `_lastMousePosition`**。

这意味着：

```
delta = 当前 - 初始
```

而你又用：

```
Left = start + delta
```

逻辑是对的。

但 `_lastMousePosition` 的名字会误导，因为它其实是：

```
startMousePosition
```

建议改名，否则后面维护会出问题。

---

# 三、Resize 逻辑基本是正确的

你的 Resize 起始代码：

```csharp
_resizeStartPoint = Mouse.GetPosition(this);
_resizeStartWidth = Width;
_resizeStartHeight = Height;
_resizeStartLeft = Left;
_resizeStartTop = Top;
```

这一段 **逻辑没有明显问题**。

但有两个隐患。

---

# 四、Resize 可能不工作的两个常见原因

## 1 ZIndex 问题

你的 XAML：

```xml
<Rectangle
    HorizontalAlignment="Left"
    Width="8"
    Fill="Transparent"
    Cursor="SizeWE"
    MouseLeftButtonDown="ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown"
/>
```

但没有：

```
Panel.ZIndex
```

如果你的结构类似：

```
Grid
 ├ CommandPanel
 └ ResizeRectangles
```

只要：

```
CommandPanel 在视觉树上层
```

Rectangle 就 **永远收不到鼠标**。

建议：

```xml
Panel.ZIndex="999"
```

例如：

```xml
<Rectangle
    Panel.ZIndex="999"
    Width="8"
    Fill="Transparent"
    Cursor="SizeWE"
/>
```

---

## 2 Grid 命中区域问题

你的：

```
Grid.Row="0"
Grid.RowSpan="2"
VerticalAlignment="Stretch"
```

如果 Grid Row 高度是：

```
Auto
```

可能导致：

```
Rectangle 实际高度 = 0
```

建议确认 Grid Row：

```
Height="*"
```

否则会出现：

```
视觉存在
但 HitTest 失败
```

---

# 五、Resize MouseMove 的另一个潜在问题

你现在：

```csharp
HandleResize(Mouse.GetPosition(this));
```

同样存在 **坐标系问题**。

如果 HandleResize 内部使用：

```
delta = current - start
```

窗口在 Resize 时 **Left / Top 变化**。

就会出现：

```
resize jitter
```

Resize 同样建议用：

```
PointToScreen
```

---

# 六、动画干扰拖拽（非常关键）

你代码里有：

```
RestartInactiveTimer();
ResetOpacity();
```

而你之前说还有：

```
SnapToEdge
InactiveTimer animation
```

如果窗口属性正在被：

```
DoubleAnimation
```

控制，那么：

```
Left / Top = 手动赋值
```

会和动画 **竞争**。

拖拽开始必须停止动画：

```csharp
BeginAnimation(Window.LeftProperty, null);
BeginAnimation(Window.TopProperty, null);
```

否则会出现：

```
拖拽 → 动画拉回 → 再拖拽 → 再拉回
```

表现就是 **抖动 / 卡顿**。

---

# 七、你这个 Resize 实现其实还能更简单

WPF 最稳定方案其实不是 8 个 Rectangle。

而是处理：

```
WM_NCHITTEST
```

返回：

```
HTLEFT
HTRIGHT
HTTOP
HTBOTTOM
HTTOPLEFT
```

优点：

* 系统原生 Resize
* 没有 MouseMove 逻辑
* 不会抖动
* 支持 DPI
* 性能最好

很多框架都这么做，例如：

* MahApps
* HandyControl
* ModernWPF

---

# 八、我给你的结论

你现在的问题 **90% 在拖拽代码**。

关键修复：

### 必须改

1️⃣ 用 `PointToScreen`
2️⃣ Resize 也用 Screen 坐标
3️⃣ 拖拽开始 `CaptureMouse()`
4️⃣ 拖拽开始停止动画

### 很可能要改

5️⃣ `Panel.ZIndex="999"`
6️⃣ Grid Row Height 确认不是 0

---

# 九、我建议的拖拽标准模板（WPF）

稳定版本：

```csharp
private Point _dragStartMouse;
private double _dragStartLeft;
private double _dragStartTop;

protected override void OnMouseLeftButtonDown(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
{
    base.OnMouseLeftButtonDown(e);

    _isDragging = true;

    _dragStartMouse = PointToScreen(Mouse.GetPosition(this));
    _dragStartLeft = Left;
    _dragStartTop = Top;

    CaptureMouse();

    BeginAnimation(Window.LeftProperty, null);
    BeginAnimation(Window.TopProperty, null);
}

protected override void OnMouseMove(MouseEventArgs e)
{
    base.OnMouseMove(e);

    if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
    {
        Point screenPos = PointToScreen(Mouse.GetPosition(this));

        Left = _dragStartLeft + (screenPos.X - _dragStartMouse.X);
        Top  = _dragStartTop + (screenPos.Y - _dragStartMouse.Y);
    }
}

protected override void OnMouseLeftButtonUp(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
{
    base.OnMouseLeftButtonUp(e);

    _isDragging = false;
    ReleaseMouseCapture();
}
```

---

* 拖拽抖动
* Resize 不稳定
* SnapToEdge 冲突
* 动画干扰

而且会比你现在的实现 **稳定很多**。

好的！根据你的分析，我来重构代码。主要修改：

1. 使用 `PointToScreen now.` 获取屏幕坐标
2. 拖拽开始时停止动画
3. 添加 `Panel.ZIndex`
4. 修复 Grid 布局

让我直接修改：
<think>
 Thinking...
 "using System;
using System.Windows;
using System.Windows.Controls;
using System.Windows.Input;
using System.Windows.Media.Animation;
using System.Windows.Threading;
namespace WebViewHub
{
    public partial class FloatingIslandWindow : Window
    {
        private DispatcherTimer _inactiveTimer;
        private bool _isExpanded = false;
        
        public MainWindow MainWindowReference { get; set; }
        // 拖拽状态
        private bool _isDragging = false;
        private Point _dragStartScreenPos;  // 屏幕坐标
        private double _dragStartLeft;
        private double _dragStartTop;
        // 缩放状态
        private bool _isResizing = false;
        private string _resizeDirection = "";
        private Point _resizeStartScreenPos;
        private double _resizeStartWidth;
        private double _resizeStartHeight;
        private double _resizeStartLeft;
        private double _resizeStartTop;
        // 点击判定
        private bool _hasMoved = false;
        public FloatingIslandWindow()
        {
            InitializeComponent();
            
            _inactiveTimer = new DispatcherTimer
            {
                Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3)
            };
            _inactiveTimer.Tick += InactiveTimer_Tick;
        }
        private void Window_Loaded(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
        {
            CommandPanel.MainWindowReference = MainWindowReference;
            _inactiveTimer.Start();
        }
        private void Window_Deactivated(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                Collapse();
            }
        }
        // ========== 拖拽处理 - 使用屏幕坐标 ==========
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonDown(e);
            // 停止所有动画
            BeginAnimation(Window.LeftProperty, null);
            BeginAnimation(Window.TopProperty, null);
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                // 展开状态下，点击标题栏区域才开始拖拽
                var pos = e.GetPosition(FloatingPanel);
                if (pos.Y <= 24) // 标题栏区域内
                {
                    _isDragging = true;
                    _hasMoved = false;
                    _dragStartLeft = Left;
                    _dragStartTop = Top;
                    _dragStartScreenPos = PointToScreen(e.GetPosition(this));
                    CaptureMouse();
                    e.Handled = true;
                }
                return;
            }
            // 收起状态
            if (e.OriginalSource is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle)
            {
                return;
            }
            _isDragging = true;
            _hasMoved = false;
            _dragStartLeft = Left;
            _dragStartTop = Top;
            _dragStartScreenPos = PointToScreen(e.GetPosition(this));
            
            CaptureMouse();
            RestartInactiveTimer();
            ResetOpacity();
            e.Handled = true;
        }
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseMove(MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseMove(e);
            if (_isDragging && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                // 使用屏幕坐标计算 delta
                Point currentScreenPos = PointToScreen(e.GetPosition(this));
                double deltaX = currentScreenPos.X - _dragStartScreenPos.X;
                double deltaY = currentScreenPos.Y - _dragStartScreenPos.Y;
                if (Math.Abs(deltaX) > 1 || Math.Abs(deltaY) > 1)
                {
                    _hasMoved = true;
                }
                Left = _dragStartLeft + deltaX;
                Top = _dragStartTop + deltaY;
            }
            else if (_isResizing && e.LeftButton == MouseButtonState.Pressed)
            {
                // Resize 也使用屏幕坐标
                Point currentScreenPos = PointToScreen(e.GetPosition(this));
                HandleResize(currentScreenPos);
            }
        }
        protected override void OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnPreviewMouseLeftButtonUp(e);
            if (_isDragging)
            {
                _isDragging = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                
                // 收起状态：没有移动=点击，有移动=拖拽
                if (!_isExpanded && !_hasMoved)
                {
                    Expand();
                }
                else if (!_isExpanded && _hasMoved)
                {
                    SnapToEdge();
                }
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
            else if (_isResizing)
            {
                _isResizing = false;
                ReleaseMouseCapture();
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                e.Handled = true;
            }
        }
        // ========== 缩放处理 - 使用屏幕坐标 ==========
        private void ResizeBorder_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (sender is System.Windows.Shapes.Rectangle rect && _isExpanded)
            {
                _isResizing = true;
                _resizeDirection = rect.Tag?.ToString() ?? "SE";
                
                // 使用屏幕坐标
                _resizeStartScreenPos = PointToScreen(e.GetPosition(this));
                _resizeStartWidth = Width;
                _resizeStartHeight = Height;
                _resizeStartLeft = Left;
                _resizeStartTop = Top;
                // 停止动画
                BeginAnimation(Window.LeftProperty, null);
                BeginAnimation(Window.TopProperty, null);
                BeginAnimation(Window.WidthProperty, null);
                BeginAnimation(Window.HeightProperty, null);
                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }
        private void HandleResize(Point currentScreenPos)
        {
            double minWidth = 200;
            double minHeight = 150;
            double maxWidth = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double maxHeight = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height;
            double deltaX = currentScreenPos.X - _resizeStartScreenPos.X;
            double deltaY = currentScreenPos.Y - _resizeStartScreenPos.Y;
            switch (_resizeDirection)
            {
                case "SE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "SW":
                    double newWidthSW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthSW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthSW);
                        Width = newWidthSW;
                    }
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "NE":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    double newHeightNE = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNE != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNE);
                        Height = newHeightNE;
                    }
                    break;
                case "NW":
                    double newWidthNW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthNW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthNW);
                        Width = newWidthNW;
                    }
                    double newHeightNW = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightNW != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightNW);
                        Height = newHeightNW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "E":
                    Width = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth + deltaX));
                    break;
                case "W":
                    double newWidthW = Math.Max(minWidth, Math.Min(maxWidth, _resizeStartWidth - deltaX));
                    if (newWidthW != Width)
                    {
                        Left = _resizeStartLeft + (_resizeStartWidth - newWidthW);
                        Width = newWidthW;
                    }
                    break;
                case "S":
                    Height = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight + deltaY));
                    break;
                case "N":
                    double newHeightN = Math.Max(minHeight, Math.Min(maxHeight, _resizeStartHeight - deltaY));
                    if (newHeightN != Height)
                    {
                        Top = _resizeStartTop + (_resizeStartHeight - newHeightN);
                        Height = newHeightN;
                    }
                    break;
            }
        }
        // ========== 标题栏拖拽处理 ==========
        private void TitleBar_MouseLeftButtonDown(object sender, MouseButtonEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_isExpanded)
            {
                _isDragging = true;
                _hasMoved = false;
                _dragStartLeft = Left;
                _dragStartTop = Top;
                _dragStartScreenPos = PointToScreen(e.GetPosition(this));
                
                // 停止动画
                BeginAnimation(Window.LeftProperty, null);
                BeginAnimation(Window.TopProperty, null);
                
                CaptureMouse();
                e.Handled = true;
                RestartInactiveTimer();
                ResetOpacity();
            }
        }
        // ========== 闲置处理 ==========
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseEnter(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            ResetOpacity();
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
        }
        private void FloatingIsland_MouseLeave(object sender, MouseEventArgs e)
        {
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                RestartInactiveTimer();
            }
        }
        private void RestartInactiveTimer()
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded)
            {
                _inactiveTimer.Start();
            }
        }
        private void InactiveTimer_Tick(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            if (!_isExpanded && !IsMouseOver)
            {
                // 闲置状态降透明度
                var anim = new DoubleAnimation(0.3, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)));
                BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, anim);
                // 根据所在屏幕吸附一半身位
                double cx = Left + Width / 2;
                double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
                double targetX = cx < sw / 2 ? -25 : sw - 25;
                
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500)))
                {
                    EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
                };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }
        private void ResetOpacity()
        {
            BeginAnimation(OpacityProperty, null);
            Opacity = 1.0;
            
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            if (Left < 0)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(0, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
            else if (Left > sw - 50)
            {
                var moveAnim = new DoubleAnimation(sw - 50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(300))) 
                { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
                BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, moveAnim);
            }
        }
        private void SnapToEdge()
        {
            double sw = SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width;
            double targetX = (Left + Width / 2) < (sw / 2) ? 0 : (sw - 50);
            
            var animX = new DoubleAnimation(targetX, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            {
                EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut }
            };
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, animX);
        }
        // ========== 展开/收缩动作 ==========
        public void Expand()
        {
            if (_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = true;
            _inactiveTimer.Stop();
            ResetOpacity();
            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            double cx = Left + 25;
            double cy = Top + 25;
            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(400, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(300, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(16);
            double newLeft = cx - 200;
            double newTop = cy - 250; 
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 400));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 300));
            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            
            // 展开后夺取输入焦点
            Activate();
            CommandPanel.Focus();
        }
        public void Collapse()
        {
            if (!_isExpanded) return;
            _isExpanded = false;
            IconGrid.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
            FloatingPanel.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
            double cx = Left + Width / 2;
            double cy = Top + 120;
            var widthAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            
            var heightAnim = new DoubleAnimation(50, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            FloatingIsland.CornerRadius = new CornerRadius(25);
            double newLeft = cx - 25;
            double newTop = cy - 25;
            newLeft = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newLeft, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Width - 50));
            newTop = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(newTop, SystemParameters.WorkArea.Height - 50));
            var leftAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newLeft, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            var topAnim = new DoubleAnimation(newTop, new Duration(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)))
            { EasingFunction = new CubicEase { EasingMode = EasingMode.EaseOut } };
            BeginAnimation(WidthProperty, widthAnim);
            BeginAnimation(HeightProperty, heightAnim);
            BeginAnimation(LeftProperty, leftAnim);
            BeginAnimation(TopProperty, topAnim);
            RestartInactiveTimer();
        }
    }
}
